prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: X-103 Confined space is observed during operation after the reported concern was checked. Readings are steady, no abnormal sound or heat is noted, and the maintenance log shows the standard functional check was completed with no open punch note. Source anchors for review: OSHA 1910.146.
title: T1 X-103 Compliant Fault diagnosis
